response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume portrays a senior/lead profile with no indication of willingness or readiness to operate as an entry-level contributor in an insurance-sector agile team.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops/talks
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but fluency is a hard requirement
Resume reflects senior/lead roles, not entry-level candidate mindset or experience
Java experience is listed but not demonstrated in professional projects; primary stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang
